text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka and I are on the way home from an
outing when we decide to stop by the shopping
district.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's so crowded.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, there's a raffle. No wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me, I'm pretty sure we got a ticket
earlier when we were shopping.
choice_data_list: We have a ticket, so why not give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
They gave the ticket to you, so you should be the
one to try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang-clang! Clang-clang!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Well, would you look at that! We've got a lucky
first-prize winner! You get to walk away with the
deluxe carrot hamburger steak! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... That bell sounds so familiar...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it kind of takes me back.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Back in my hometown, there was this little
race I ran in as a kid.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was called the Kiddy Race. It was so small and
informal, we didn't even have a proper finish line.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Instead, one of the adults would ring a handbell
when one of us finished.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It sounded exactly like the one the clerk just rang.
choice_data_list:
Then let's get first place and hear the bell
again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Get first place? Don't you mean "win the
first-prize"?
choice_data_list:
Nope! You have to get first place just like you
did at the Kiddy Race!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you sure I can use your ticket, though?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. I'll go get first place, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She goes to the clerk, exchanges the ticket, and
turns the handle on the raffle spinner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the spinner's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gasp! I placed even higher than first?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that even possible in a race, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: I guess it's like breaking a record?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Breaking a record...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's a fun way to think of it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
What am I supposed to do with this coupon,
though?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've only ever gone on vacation with my family, so
I don't know what to do...
choice_data_list:
You can go with a friend too. Why not invite
someone?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's certainly an idea...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then... who should I invite? Vacations are such
special occasions, after all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm...
choice_data_list: You don't have to decide now.
You don't have to decide now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's true. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Do you think you could hold on to this coupon
for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If I kept it, I'd constantly worry about who I
should invite.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Once I've decided, I'll be sure to get it from you.
Could you please keep it safe until then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she requests and take the coupon for
safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! I got first place! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Even if it's just a raffle, I'm so glad I got first.
choice_data_list: Well, it is a tasty-looking hamburger steak.
Well, it is a tasty-looking hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It certainly is.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But it's a bit much considering I've still got dinner
at the dorm to think about... So would you like to
split it with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm more than happy to, so I agree to share the
hamburger steak with her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... I was so close to winning first...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But wow, what an incredible amount of carrots.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What should I do with them all?
choice_data_list:
Why don't you share them with the others at the
dorm?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's a good idea. I'll do that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, Spe will be so excited when she sees them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I help Silence Suzuka carry her carrots back to the
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh... Third place...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I guess I didn't have enough luck
to take first today...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should have asked Fukukitaru for a good
luck charm first.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, she has one that's meant to boost
your luck for drawing fortune slips and such.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I can't say for sure how effective it is, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We plop her third-prize carrot into a shopping
bag, and head back to the academy as we watch
the sun set beyond the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! It's the consolation prize for
you—a pack of tissues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I didn't even place in the top three!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This is terrible!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, we need to start training right away!
choice_data_list: It's okay! It's just a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! Y-you're right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sorry, I got a bit caught up in the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looks quite crestfallen as we head
home, gazing at the sun setting beyond the
horizon.
